scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c orange,blue "npm run dev --workspace @gradusy24/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace @gradusy24/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @gradusy24/shared && npm run build --workspace @gradusy24/frontend && npm run build --workspace @gradusy24/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @gradusy24/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @gradusy24/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace @gradusy24/backend
